race.comment: SHE'S ASTUNNERARCH (11) wasn't the best away on debut last start over 1462m at this track but worked into the race impressively in the soft going to get up for third, beaten just 1.1 lengths. Scratched from a slightly shorter race at Bendigo on Friday to be kept for this. Likely improver in an ideal race. DEMPSEY (2) registered his first minor placing at start seven when close up in a similar race here 17 days ago. Needs a bit of luck from a wide alley but the signs last time were positive. FIERCE FIASCO (3) returned from a 29-week spell for new trainer Andrew Noblet and did a good job to finish fourth over 1462m here. Sure to appreciate the extra ground which brings him right into calculations. IT MATTERS (8) improves each time she steps out. Charged home late to get up for second at her latest appearance over the mile at Wangaratta. One of the better hopes. JUST CURIOUS (9) might find this a bit easier than her last couple and can work her way into the frame.
